calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-04-2008 Reset To Oct-30-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Petitioner Aaron Brown was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minor Devin Zane White, who was not present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

The Court cannot proceed with the proposed name change due to the fact that there is no Proof of Service in the case file indicating that the minor's mother was provided notice of today's hearing. Good cause appearing, Order to Show Cause for Change of Name of the Minor, Devin Zane White, is continued to October 30, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.

Reissued Order to Show Cause for Change of Name of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.
